div1.entryFree:
Rarity, 1) excellence: beauty, truth, and r. Phoen. 53. but the r. of it is, Tp. II, 1, 58. he hath out-villained villany so far, that the r. redeems him, All's IV, 3, 306.
2) something excellent: feeds on the --es of nature's truth, Sonn. 60, 11. beyond credit, as many vouched --es are, Tp. II, 1, 60. but what particular r.? Tim. I, 1, 4. sorrow would be a r. most beloved, if all could so become it, Lr. IV, 3, 25.
